 title: Add tests for get_diagnostics pull diagnostics path
 ---
 ops/get_diagnostics.rs

Coverage: 76.1% (51/67 lines)

Uncovered lines: 118-119, 122, 137, 141, 143-144, 146-147, 151-153, 158, 170, 174, 202

Two areas:
1. `try_pull_diagnostics` (lines 137-183) - builds URI, sends textDocument/diagnostic, handles null/error response, parses diagnostics, enriches/filters
2. `parse_diagnostics_from_result` line 202 - direct-array format (not {items:[...]})

Test scenarios:
- Mock LSP returning diagnostic response with items → verify DiagnosticsResult populated
- Null response → Ok(None)
- Response with `error` field → Ok(None)
- Response as direct array vs {items:[...]} wrapper
- Severity filtering applied correctly

#coverage-gap #coverage-gap
